projects.title: FaaSr: Multi-Cloud Serverless Framework
projects.bodyText:
- Architected FaaSr, a serverless framework for multi-cloud deployment (AWS, GCP, OpenWhisk, SLURM, GitHub Actions).
- Containerized workflows with Docker; integrated JWT and OAuth 2.0 for secure authentication.
- Automated pipelines for ecological forecasting workflows via FLARE integration.
- Enhanced scalability, portability, and automation across distributed environments.

projects.title: BugSleuth: Unsupervised Bug Localization
projects.bodyText:
- Developed an unsupervised bug localization technique using genetic programming.
- Achieved millisecond runtime with 56% of bugs localized across 704 real-world Java projects in top-5 ranked statements.
- Surpassed state-of-the-art methods; submitted to ICSE'25.

projects.title: VivaMind – Mental Health & Wellness Tracker
projects.bodyText:
- Co-founded and developed a mental health tracking platform on the MERN stack.
- Scaled to 5k+ active users with 20% improved retention.
- AI-driven sentiment analysis boosted engagement by 25% and achieved 75% user satisfaction.
- Architected secure MongoDB model supporting 1M+ data points and enabled B2B therapist integrations.

projects.title: College Recommendation System
projects.bodyText:
- Built a mobile app in Flutter for recommending colleges based on user profile.
- Implemented Python-based web scraping with BeautifulSoup.
- Developed Random Forest-based recommendation algorithm with 97.89% accuracy.

projects.title: Automated Wetland Delineation (ISRO)
projects.bodyText:
- Directed deep learning project at ISRO for mapping wetlands using hyperspectral LISS-III imagery.
- Designed an atrous CNN that outperformed U-Net, reducing parameters by 100×.
- Achieved Dice coefficients of 0.68 (train) and 0.65 (validation).
- Reduced manual delineation effort by 80%, used as a QC tool at ISRO.

projects.title: SAP Material Management Workflow Optimization
projects.bodyText:
- Redesigned SAP Material Management workflows using parallel processing and milestone tracking.
- Identified process bottlenecks and KPIs, achieving a 70% improvement in material creation efficiency.
- Demonstrated expertise in enterprise workflow automation and KPI-driven performance improvements.

projects.title: Finance Master Data Automation
projects.bodyText:
- Automated finance master data load process by replacing legacy file transfers with a secure Webdynpro application.
- Reduced data load time from 8 hours to a few minutes.
- Leveraged SAP HANA and OData services to deliver real-time data flows with enterprise-grade security.
